content_of_post_to_comment:
I just had a couple week relapse of my three months without a smart phone. I need some motivation to hop back into it!

What have you learned?

What have you read?

New hobby?

Talked to a new stranger?

Found a passion?

Noticed something new about the world, your surroundings or yourself?

And

Have you missed out on anything? Event, new movie, or breaking news
comment: Three months without a smartphone is actually a pretty long stretch, so a relapse doesn't erase what you learned during that time. I think the most interesting part is noticing what fills the space when the phone disappears. For me, boredom was uncomfortable at first, but it eventually turned into time for random walks, reading, and deeper conversations. Did you notice what you naturally reached for during those three months?
